categories.name: Action
categories.description: Requires Giorgos to do something, reply, decide, approve, review, pay, sign, or schedule.

categories.name: Review
categories.description: Worth reading or checking, but not clearly urgent.

categories.name: Events
categories.description: Calendar invitations, event updates, tickets, bookings, schedules, travel, appointments.

categories.name: Information
categories.description: Useful reference information with no immediate action.

categories.name: Newsletters
categories.description: Subscribed content, digests, product updates, marketing newsletters.

categories.name: Safe to Delete
categories.description: Low-value automated or promotional messages that appear safe to ignore. Never delete automatically.
